title: ClaimEnvelope
description: Bounded claim with scope, citations, uncertainty, review state, and evidence linkage. A claim may be denied, abstained, corrected, or superseded. render=true only when all required evidence refs are resolved and approved. Any unresolved ref produces render=false.

claim_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this claim.

evidence_refs.description: Required evidence references that support this claim. All must resolve for render=true.

composed_claim_refs.description: Optional references to composed sub-claims. All must resolve for render=true.

render.description: True only when all required evidence_refs and composed_claim_refs are resolved and approved. False when any required ref is unresolved, missing, or unapproved.

review_state.description: Review or approval state for this claim.

uncertainty.description: Declared uncertainty summary for this claim.

decision.description: Cite when evidence resolves, abstain when evidence is missing or unresolvable, deny when policy forbids.
